intro: Hypolytrum anomalum, also known as Anomalous Flagroot, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cyperaceae. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties that may help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and protect against oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Hypolytrum anomalum include alkaloids, glycosides, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
